"-" = Unknown; -2 = Space.
154 D2A D2A_SIDE_VISN_PROB (D2A) Side Vision Problems CHAR 1 Vision Patterns: visual limitations/difficulties - side vision problems. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
155 D2B D2B_FLASHES_LIGHT (D2B) Experiences Seeing Halos/Rings Around Light/Flashes of Light CHAR 1 Vision Patterns: visual limitations/difficulties - sees halos/rings/flashes/curtains. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
156 D2C D2C_NONE_ABOVE (D2C) None of Above Visual Limitations
